narrative:
Stark County has 243,892 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.0 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.0% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.0% D−R vs -5.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
